title: memory_delete partial string match nukes unrelated L3 entries
what_failed: Called memory_delete with target="User is currently located in Atlanta" — deleted 20 entries including the entire L3 profile. The delete matched far beyond the intended single entry.
suggested_fix: Delete should match by exact content or ID only, not substring. Add a max_delete=1 guard for single-target deletes, or require ID-based deletion for L3.
resolution: Partial string match (content search) returned all rows because _l3_fast_path returned non-matching rows with non-zero imp+recency scores. Fixed: match_score > 0 filter added to _l3_fast_path; only rows containing query string are returned.
